scripts.release:dry-run: bun run build && bun publish --dry-run --cwd packages/types && bun publish --dry-run --cwd packages/client && bun publish --dry-run --cwd packages/server && bun publish --dry-run --cwd packages/agent-sandbox-provider && bun publish --dry-run --cwd packages/opencode-plugin
scripts.release:all: bun run build && bun run release:whoami && bun run release:types && bun run release:client && bun run release:server && bun run release:provider && bun run release:opencode-plugin
